title: calamus manillensis
intro: Calamus manillensis, also known as Java sedge, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae, native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamus manillensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Calamus manillensis typically involve drying and processing the roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
